---
title: "Release Catalogue"
description: "Catalogue of approved and draft BNR public release products."
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
---

# Release Catalogue

The release catalogue is the public index of BNR analytical products made available through the Information Hub.

It records what has been released, what period each product covers, which files are available, and where users can find the briefing, metadata, tables, figures, and supporting data.

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
The catalogue describes public or publication-ready products. It does not contain confidential source data or private working files.
:::

## Current releases

::: {.grid .mb-4}

::: {.g-col-12}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm}
::: {.card-body}

## Hospital Cardiovascular Cases in Barbados, 2023

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-8}

A static BNR CVD briefing summarising hospital-registered stroke and heart attack cases in Barbados during 2023, with comparison against the average annual pattern from 2018 to 2022.

The briefing is the first pilot of the new Stata-to-Quarto static reporting pathway.

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-4}

| Field | Detail |
|---|---|
| Briefing ID | `cvd_cases_2023_v1` |
| Product type | Static briefing |
| Domain | Cardiovascular disease |
| Target year | 2023 |
| Baseline | 2018–2022 |
| Status | Draft / pilot |
| Compute layer | Stata |
| Publication layer | Quarto |

:::

:::

### Public briefing products

- [View the web briefing](../surveillance/cvd/briefings/case-counts.qmd)
- [Download the PDF briefing](../surveillance/cvd/briefings/bnr_cvd_cases_2023_v1.pdf)

### Public tables

- [Download 2023 case counts by sex and event type](files/briefings/cvd_cases_2023_v1/tables/cases_2023_sex_event.csv)
- [Download 2023 case counts by age group, sex, and event type](files/briefings/cvd_cases_2023_v1/tables/age70_2023_sex_event.csv)

### Figure data

- [Download cumulative weekly case data](files/briefings/cvd_cases_2023_v1/data/cases_2023_cum_week.csv)
- [Download age-group figure data](files/briefings/cvd_cases_2023_v1/data/cases_2023_age70.csv)

### Figures

- [Download cumulative weekly case figure](files/briefings/cvd_cases_2023_v1/figures/cases_2023_cum_week.png)
- [Download age-group figure](files/briefings/cvd_cases_2023_v1/figures/cases_2023_age70.png)

### Metadata and build record

- [Download public metadata](files/briefings/cvd_cases_2023_v1/meta.yml)
- [Download build record](files/briefings/cvd_cases_2023_v1/build.yml)

:::
:::
:::

## Release structure

Each static briefing release uses the same broad structure:

```text
outputs/public/briefings/{briefing_id}/
├── tables/
├── figures/
├── data/
├── meta.yml
└── build.yml
```

Before publication, the approved output bundle is copied into the site-accessible download area:

```text
site/downloads/files/briefings/{briefing_id}/
```

Quarto-generated PDF briefings are created during the Quarto render process and linked from the relevant briefing page and catalogue entry.

## Status definitions

| Status | Meaning |
|---|---|
| Draft / pilot | Product is being tested within the new workflow and may still be revised. |
| Approved | Product has been reviewed and approved for public release. |
| Superseded | Product remains available for transparency but has been replaced by a later version. |
| Archived | Product is retained for historical reference only. |

## Notes for users

CSV files are provided for public reuse. Figure data are provided where they support transparency and reproducibility of published figures.

Metadata files describe the contents of each release bundle. Build records describe when and how the public output bundle was created.

Confidential source data are not included in public release bundles.
